---
title: "Housing and Net Zero"
description: "Talk on housing energy performance and pathways to net zero."
author: "Adam Dennett"
date: "2024-03-07"
categories: [talk, housing, EPC]
image: featured.jpg
---

[![Housing and Net Zero — click for the full slides](featured.jpg)](https://adamdennett.github.io/EPC_Data_Analysis/HousingAndNetZero.html)

A presentation on housing stock energy performance and what the EPC data
can (and can't) tell us about routes to net zero.

[Open the slides →](https://adamdennett.github.io/EPC_Data_Analysis/HousingAndNetZero.html)
